report.summary: 5 pages published today (crypto-loans calculators, exchange/card best-of pages), 2 queued pages ready for next cycle. 4 learn pages have TS syntax errors (102 total) — pre-existing regression. 6/6 API routes structurally healthy with correct caching. Production site unreachable from sandbox for live verification.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 5 pages published today (2026-03-27): /crypto-loans/calculators/loan-calculator, /crypto-loans/calculators/ltv-calculator, /exchanges/best/bitcoin, /exchanges/best/usa, /crypto-cards/compare/crypto-com-vs-binance-card — all have page.tsx files ✓
2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE: /learn/virtuals-protocol-guide, /learn/grass-protocol-depin-guide — both have page.tsx ready ✓
554 total published slugs across all categories

TypeScript errors in 4 learn pages (pre-existing, not new this cycle): lido-v3-stvaults (94 errors — JSX syntax), crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4 errors — unescaped >), institutional-crypto-adoption (2 errors — unescaped $1B), crypto-index-funds (2 errors — unescaped >). These are JSX escaping issues, not logic bugs.
structured-data.examples.ts has TS errors but is a reference file, not imported into the build
Local build fails with Bus error (sandbox OOM) — not indicative of Vercel production build health

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes have route.ts files and are structurally healthy: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs configured correctly: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60-120s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (variable)
All routes implement stale-while-revalidate fallback patterns
All routes have error fallback responses returning cached/default data on upstream failure
Cannot verify live API responses from sandbox (egress blocked) — no rate-limit or stale-data issues detectable this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: Vercel project active: prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75 (cryptodegen)
Latest commit: 21aaf5b — batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes
Cannot verify live deployment status from sandbox (network egress blocked for degen0x.com)
No new deployments triggered this cycle — last deploy was the batch commit
Local build OOM is sandbox-specific (8GB heap insufficient for 554+ page static gen); Vercel builds have higher memory limits

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: 5 new pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (crypto-loans calculators, exchange/card pages)
2 new learn guides built and queued (Virtuals Protocol, GRASS Protocol) — ready for next promotion
Carry-over: 4 learn pages with TS syntax errors need JSX escaping fixes before next build verification
No blockers for next cycle — queued pages are ready, just need promotion
Recommendation: Fix the 4 broken learn pages (especially lido-v3 with 94 errors) in next programmer cycle to maintain clean TS compilation
